case_title: MOHAMED A KARAH VS. IZZUDDIN AHMED

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-26-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MOHAMED A. KARAH IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT IZZUDDIN AHMED IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF FILED A REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL MAR-17-17. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
